creator: junchoon@dec.sakura.ne.jp
text:
Note that attached patch is not a complete fix but a quick fix.
Because if base is built/installed with WITHOUT_TEST knob, even 14.x and later does not have kyua.

Giving up for complete fix, as I cannot find proper way for every clean room builders like poudriere, synth, jenkins and so on to check whether base has kyua or not.

See also (not accepted in "See Also:" field):
https://forums.freebsd.org/threads/is-usr-ports-devel-pkgconf-misconfigured.95756/
